name: Jerry Goodman
abstract: Jerry Goodman (born March 16, 1949) is an American violinist known for playing electric violin with The Flock and the jazz fusion ensemble Mahavishnu Orchestra.

about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] This is with the forerunner of Mahavishnu, Jerry Goodman, Billy Cobham, but then . . . [INTERVIEWEE] It is, yep. And then Badal’s there.
